justification: All six pass criteria met: (1) Chain timeout violation identified — OrderService can take 6s via 3s+3s retry, exceeding CartService's 5s timeout, explicitly called out with math. (2) Missing circuit breaker on OrderService identified — detailed connection pool exhaustion analysis included. (3) PaymentService 8s gateway timeout > CartService 5s timeout identified as zombie/orphaned payment risk. (4) Dual-write/partial completion risk identified — order created with stock reserved but payment fails, no compensation, stock leaks. (5) Saga/compensation pattern recommended — cancelOrder endpoint, background reaper, and architectural escalation to MJ for saga pattern decision. (6) Verdict is NOT READY.

observations.text: Timeout hierarchy visualization makes the inverted timeout problem immediately clear
Identified not just the chain timeout but explained why the retry is counterproductive — it can never complete within the parent's budget
Zombie payment scenario thoroughly analyzed — customer sees failure, retries, gets double-charged
Identified the CartService crash between OrderService and PaymentService as an additional partial failure mode beyond the basic dual-write
Missing circuit breaker analysis is thorough — covers both CartService→OrderService and PaymentService→Gateway gaps
Recommendations are prioritized into blocking/high/nice-to-have with concrete fixes including specific timeout values
Correctly escalated architectural decisions (saga pattern) to MJ and domain correctness to Bird
Identified observability gaps that would make these failures undetectable in production
